svg.title: Pump Cartridge Dock Assembly — Engineering Drawing
svg.text: 3 Parts: Cradle + Floor Plate + Face Frame — Third-Angle Orthographic Projection
Material: PETG | All dimensions in mm | Dock Y=0 is rear wall, Y=130 is front opening
Scale: 8 px/mm | Cross-section through left side wall
Scale: 4 px/mm | Rear wall inboard face (Y=7)
